publicStatement: AstraTreasury Base Mainnet contracts are deployed in restricted operational mode. This is not a public token sale, investment product, staking/rewards launch, buyback program, or autonomous execution launch.
announcement:
# AstraTreasury Restricted Mainnet Deployment Announcement

## Approved announcement

AstraTreasury Protocol has completed a restricted Base Mainnet deployment.

The deployed contracts are public, verified, monitored, and controlled through Safe-based governance. AstraTreasury remains in restricted operational mode.

Current status:

- Base Mainnet contracts deployed.
- Governance Safe setup complete.
- Post-deployment verification passed.
- Read-only mainnet monitoring active.
- Event monitoring and alert escalation active.
- Incident acknowledgement workflow active.
- Mainnet execution queue disabled.
- Public token sale not approved.
- Real treasury funding not approved.
- Staking and rewards not approved.
- Buyback program not approved.
- Autonomous execution not approved.

Public links:

- Mainnet manifest: https://astratreasury.ai/mainnet
- Live status: https://astratreasury.ai/live
- Monitor: https://astratreasury.ai/monitor
- Restricted operations: https://astratreasury.ai/restricted-operations
- Restricted launch status: https://astratreasury.ai/launch
- Transparency index: https://astratreasury.ai/transparency

## Required disclaimer

AstraTreasury is not offering a public token sale. ASTP is not being marketed as an investment product. The deployment does not approve real treasury funding, staking, rewards, buybacks, or autonomous execution.

faq:
# Restricted Launch Public FAQ

## Is AstraTreasury live on mainnet?

AstraTreasury contracts are deployed on Base Mainnet in restricted operational mode.

## Is there a public token sale?

No.

## Is ASTP an investment product?

No. AstraTreasury does not promise returns.

## Is the treasury funded with real assets?

No real treasury funding is approved.

## Are staking or rewards live?

No.

## Are buybacks live?

No.

## Is autonomous execution live?

No.

## Is the mainnet execution queue enabled?

No. The mainnet execution queue remains disabled.

## What is available publicly?

The mainnet contract manifest, monitoring pages, alert status, incident summary, transparency index, and restricted launch status are publicly available.
